evals.prompt: I changed convert and now examples:verify fails on one fixture. Use the repo skill to tell me where to look first and what command loop to run.
evals.expected_output: Identifies packages/core convert ownership, the example verifier script, and recommends the build plus examples:verify loop with a narrow fixture-first debug path.

evals.prompt: I need to fix a docs deployment issue in rn-mt. Tell me what files own the docs routes, the docs shell, and the GitHub Pages behavior.
evals.expected_output: Points to apps/docs/lib/docs.ts, apps/docs/lib/page-route.tsx, apps/docs/components/docs-shell.tsx, apps/docs/next.config.mjs, and .github/workflows/docs-pages.yml.

evals.prompt: I am debugging a target resolution bug where sync writes the wrong runtime values. Tell me which modules, generated files, and commands matter in this repo.
evals.expected_output: Points to manifest and sync modules, runtime artifact files, target set plus sync reproduction commands, and the current/shared/tenants model.
